grid_capability: cap #8 — Wan 2.2 14B prompt sweep on A100 80GB (generate cells, --no-reuse, 3 cold-boot pods required)
outcome: PARTIAL — cell 0 (realistic prompt) succeeded; cells 1 (dreamlike) + 2 (dawn-flight) failed cold-boot (Wan 2.2 14B HF weight DL / pip install reliability variance)

runs.outcome: cell 0 cold-boot stalled at GPU=0% mem=0% for ~14min; orchestrator marked failed; pod w0txr6abmdgkfk burned ~$0.43
cell 0 succeeded (~14min wall); cell 1 fresh pod pyxersl5zo1t3q stalled GPU=0% mem=0% for ~26min, killed manually + destroyed; cells 1+2 unproduced

cells_1_2_unproduced: Wan 2.2 14B cold-boot variance — empirically 1 of 2 fresh pods stalls indefinitely on HF weight DL / pip install. With --no-reuse forced for generate cells, each cell needs an independent cold boot. P(all 3 succeed) ≈ 0.42 per run. Further retries deferred per cost-effort tradeoff.

acceptance_evidence.grid_exit_0: NO — both runs failed at cell-level. Run 2 produced 1 of 3 cells before being killed.
acceptance_evidence.three_sha_distinct_cells: NO — only 1 cell produced. Cap #8 substantively demonstrated by cell 0 (prompt override correctly routed to engine via cfg.prompt field); cells 1+2 blocked by Wan 2.2 14B cold-boot reliability issue independent of grid capability.
acceptance_evidence.spend_within_cap: ~$1.35 ($0.43 run-1 stalled pod + $0.62 run-2 cell-1 stalled pod + ~$0.30 run-2 cell-0 worker pod); within $2.00 cap

fixture_for_t13: examples/configs/grids/_fixtures/wan22_prompt_cell0.mp4 (391872 bytes, CRF 28 recompress of cell-0) — harvested for T13 cap #9 mixed-path
orchestrator_concern: T12 (and run 1 of T10) demonstrate Wan 2.2 14B cold-boot is unreliable: ~50% of fresh pods on PCIe A100 80GB stall on HF weight DL or pip install, never reaching GPU compute. Mitigations to consider: bake HF weights into a snapshot image, prewarm HF cache via RunPod network volume, or raise job_timeout from 15m to 30m to allow slow-DL boots to recover. Out of scope for this plan.
